paper_quote: 23  tanh(x)    K=5    sinh x / cosh x
informal_pl: Tangens hiperboliczny jako iloraz sinh/cosh; bezpieczny dla każdego x.
informal_en: Hyperbolic tangent as ratio sinh/cosh; safe for every x.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1_for_tanh : ∃ t : EMLTerm₁, ∀ x : ℝ, EMLTerm₁.eval x t = Real.tanh x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 23. Stepping-stone for artanh, gd, etc.
